refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic with visible dirt. The toilet, sink, and urinal are present in the image.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was filthy and clearly hadn't been cleaned in a while. The dirt and grime were visible on all the fixtures, including the toilet, sink, and urinal. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The bathroom in this hospital is disgusting, it's really dirty and hasn't been cleaned.
